title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: **Live Checklist (Prod reset-password smoke: `happy-smoke-operator`)** - [ ] **Preflight snapshot saved** - [ ] `cockpit_users` row captured (`is_active`, `password_hash`, `reset_token`, `reset_token_expires`) - [ ] current `refresh_tokens` count captured - [ ] **Prepare temporary reset state** - [ ] generate `RUN_ID`, `RESET_TOKEN`, `NEW_PASSWORD` - [ ] set user: `is_active=1`, `reset_token=<token>`, `reset_token_expires=now+600` - [ ] insert/record one known old refresh token (`SENTINEL_REFRESH`) for revocation proof - [ ] **Call reset-password** - [ ] `POST /api/cockpit/auth/reset-password` with `{resetToken,newPassword}` - [ ] expect `200` + `accessToken` + `refreshToken` - [ ] **Prove old refresh revocation** - [ ] `POST /api/cockpit/auth/refresh` using `SENTINEL_REFRESH` - [ ] expect `401` - [ ] **Prove login with new password** - [ ] `POST /api/cockpit/auth/login` with smoke email + `NEW_PASSWORD` - [ ] expect `200` - [ ] **Cleanup (must run even on failure)** - [ ] `DELETE FROM cockpit_refresh_tokens WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'` - [ ] `UPDATE cockpit_users SET is_active=0,password_hash=NULL,reset_token=NULL,reset_token_expires=NULL WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'` - [ ] **Cleanup assertions** - [ ] user row shows: `is_active=0`, `password_hash IS NULL`, `reset_token IS NULL`, `reset_token_expires IS NULL` - [ ] `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cockpit_refresh_tokens WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'` returns `0` **Operational Guardrails** - Use a single run lock (`RUN_ID`) and one operator only. - Never print token/password values to logs. - Enforce short reset-token TTL (<=10 min). - Use `finally`/trap for guaranteed cleanup. - Stop immediately on unexpected HTTP status; do not proceed to next step.
